title: jasminum schneideri
intro: Jasminum schneideri, also known as the golden jasmine, is a flowering plant species native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum schneideri include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant is commonly used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers can also be used to make a fragrant oil for aromatherapy.
